violations.text: No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
Single service items are being stored on the floor in the dry storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
The wall in the kitchen area is in poor repair, observed exposed wood. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
The floor and wall junctures in the ware washing do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
The floor in the kitchen and ware washing area is in poor repair, observed exposed tiles throughout. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The ceiling in the ware washing area is in poor repair, observed missing ceiling tile with exposed installation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the ware washing area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored throughout kitchen. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
Ceiling tile in the dry storage area was observed with previous water damage. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair, observed missing pieces throughout. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the following areas do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. 1. Ware washing area (floor & walls) 2. Prep area (floor) 3. Doorway (floor) New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025
Observed missing ceiling tiles in the dry storage area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025
